   124	 **                                                                        **
   125	 ** Description: Processes PDN Connectivity Reject message                 **
   126	 **                                                                        **
   127	 ** Inputs:  pti:       Procedure transaction identity             **
   128	 **      ebi:       EPS bearer identity                        **

   134	 **             the ESM message fails                      **
   135	 **      Others:    None                                       **
   136	 **                                                                        **
   137	 ***************************************************************************/
   138	int esm_recv_pdn_connectivity_reject(nas_user_t *user, int pti, int ebi,
   139	                                     const pdn_connectivity_reject_msg *msg)
   140	{
   141	  LOG_FUNC_IN;
   142	
   143	  int esm_cause;
   144	
   145	  LOG_TRACE(INFO, "ESM-SAP   - Received PDN Connectivity Reject message "
   146	            "(pti=%d, ebi=%d, cause=%d)", pti, ebi, msg->esmcause);
   147	
   148	  /*
   149	   * Procedure transaction identity checking
   150	   */
   151	  if ( (pti == ESM_PT_UNASSIGNED) || esm_pt_is_reserved(pti) ) {
   152	    /* 3GPP TS 24.301, section 7.3.1, case a
   153	     * Reserved or unassigned PTI value
   154	     */
   155	    LOG_TRACE(WARNING, "ESM-SAP   - Invalid PTI value (pti=%d)", pti);
   156	    LOG_FUNC_RETURN (ESM_CAUSE_INVALID_PTI_VALUE);
   157	  } else if ( esm_pt_is_not_in_use(user->esm_pt_data, pti) ) {
   158	    /* 3GPP TS 24.301, section 7.3.1, case a
   159	     * Assigned value that does not match any PTI in use
   160	     */
   161	    LOG_TRACE(WARNING, "ESM-SAP   - PTI mismatch (pti=%d)", pti);
   162	    LOG_FUNC_RETURN (ESM_CAUSE_PTI_MISMATCH);
   163	  }
   164	  /*
   165	   * EPS bearer identity checking
   166	   */
   167	  else if ( (ebi != ESM_EBI_UNASSIGNED) || esm_ebr_is_reserved(user->esm_ebr_data, ebi) ) {
   168	    /* 3GPP TS 24.301, section 7.3.2, case a
   169	     * Assigned or reserved EPS bearer identity value */
   170	    LOG_TRACE(WARNING, "ESM-SAP   - Invalid EPS bearer identity (ebi=%d)",
   171	              ebi);
   172	    LOG_FUNC_RETURN (ESM_CAUSE_INVALID_EPS_BEARER_IDENTITY);
   173	  }
   174	
   175	  /*
   176	   * Message processing
   177	   */
   178	  /* Get the ESM cause */
   179	  esm_cause = msg->esmcause;
   180	
   181	  /* Execute the PDN connectivity procedure not accepted by the network */
   182	  int rc = esm_proc_pdn_connectivity_reject(user, pti, &esm_cause);
   183	
   184	  if (rc != RETURNerror) {
   185	    esm_cause = ESM_CAUSE_SUCCESS;
   186	  }
   187	
   188	  /* Return the ESM cause value */
   189	  LOG_FUNC_RETURN (esm_cause);
   190	}
